title: inula ciliaris
intro: Inula ciliaris, also known as the golden ragwort or rock inula, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family. The medicinal properties of Inula ciliaris include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its ability to heal wounds and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Inula ciliaris include its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce stress. Inula ciliaris is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
